# HeadFade - Global Synthetic Media Infrastructure

HeadFade is the world's first forensic deepfake detection platform.
It features an embed player, a creator marketplace, and cognitive telemetry, powered by Gemini AI.

## Features
- **Forensic Deepfake Detection**: Uses Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite to analyze videos and determine if they are AI-generated or real.
- **Creator Marketplace**: A micro-licensing marketplace for AI creators.
- **Embed Distribution**: Publishers can embed the HeadFade player to provide forensic data on viral media.
